name: Bed of Wilted Greens for Grilled Meat
recipeIngredient: 6 cups mixed young greens, torn (including spinach, mustard, collard, beet chard, and/or radicchio)
1 small fresh red bell pepper, cut into thin strips
1 medium orange or tangerine, peeled and sectioned
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dressing ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Tear large pieces (larger than 3 inches) of mixed young greens into a large bowl, placing them and the orange sections.
3. In a large skillet, bring the salad dressing mixture to boiling. Add red pepper strips. Remove from heat and pour hot mixture over the greens, tossing to mix.
4. To serve with a grilled meat or fish steak, arrange some greens on an individual dinner plate. Arrange some of the red pepper slices around the perimeter. Place the meat in the center. Make a fan of 3 orange sections on the greens and garnish with zest strands or curls. Drizzle a spoonful of dressing on top of the grilled entree.
